name: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms managing 5-15 employees tool
description: For HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 5-15 employees, manual tracking causes missed training deadlines. We automate tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms managing 5-15 employees
problem_solved: Tracking employee training and certification deadlines

locked_fields.primary_problem: Tracking employee training and certification deadlines
